description: Both find an outdoor court near you and shoot for a set amount of time — track stats like threes made and report back
Both do the same GeoGuessr city streak simultaneously — compete for highest streak
Both pull up the same online logic puzzle or escape room and race to finish — no hints allowed
Both have one hour to find and photograph the single weirdest or most out-of-place thing in your neighborhood
Both agree on a dish but neither looks up a recipe — cook it from memory and compare photos of the results
Both grab a ball and count how many times you can juggle it without it hitting the ground — running total updated live
Both spend 20 minutes trying to get Claude to produce the most impressive or unexpected output with the same starting constraint — judge each other
Both cook something creative with only what is in your respective kitchens right now — no grocery runs — reveal over FaceTime
Both race to reach the highest accessible point near you — first to send a photo from the top wins
Both go find a hoop wall or open space and film your best trick shot — submit three attempts and judge
Both grab a board or bike and explore somewhere you haven't been in your city — share best find
Both make a cocktail using only what you have at home — same name drink but interpreted differently — taste test and compare
Both start on the same article and have 15 minutes to end up on the most insane or unrelated article possible using only links
Both attempt the same medium LeetCode problem simultaneously — first correct solution wins
Both build the tallest freestanding structure you can from household objects in 10 minutes — compare heights over FaceTime
Both have 30 minutes to find the most underrated or obscure local restaurant in your city using only reviews — compare picks
Map out 9 bars in your respective cities and have one drink at each — compare scorecards and bar quality at the end

activity_name: Go to a Live Local Event
description: Both find something happening in your city tonight and go independently — compare experiences after
Both go to a thrift store with $20 and find the most genuinely useful or impressive thing you can — reveal over FaceTime
Both go to a local bowling alley at the same time and FaceTime between frames — compare final scores
Both find a local pool hall and play strangers or practice solo — report win/loss record back
Both book the same cheap online cooking class and cook from your separate kitchens — compare plating over FaceTime
Both find a local axe throwing place and compete remotely — compare scores and film best throws
Both book a local escape room independently and compare finish times and whether you escaped
Both find a local go-kart track and race for best lap time — compare results
